summary: W1462 refines the W1461 W987 construction by replacing the unit mapping-cone strict short-exact family with closed-embedding, open-map, cokernel-top, and kernel-equality families. It constructs the strict short-exact family using MetrizableLCA.strictShortExact_of_kernel_open_closed_cokernelSubgroup_eq_top, feeds that constructed strict exactness into the W1461 input, and reassembles W981, W939, W945, W949, W730, W986, and W987 with projection theorems back to the constructed localized adjunction, strict-exact construction, boundary relation, and target/endpoint data. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1462 constructs W987 from two raw boundary fields, two raw relation fields, W944 target no-univ data, W973 closed-embedding closedness data, a normalized lift blueprint, target fixed-target uniqueness, localization-model fixed-target uniqueness, source pretriangulated structure, source triangulated structure, source triangle-completion input, endpoint strict-exact witnesses, bounded homotopy localized right adjoint, localized adjunction unit, localized adjunction counit, localized adjunction triangle identities, unit mapping-cone model, unit mapping-cone closed-embedding family, unit mapping-cone open-map family, unit mapping-cone cokernel-top family, unit mapping-cone kernel-equality family, and chosen mapping-cone isomorphism rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1462 raw boundary-field, raw relation-field, W944, W973, normalized lift blueprint, target fixed-target uniqueness, localization-model fixed-target uniqueness, source pretriangulated, source triangulated, triangle-completion, endpoint strict-exact, localized right adjoint, localized adjunction unit, localized adjunction counit, localized adjunction triangle identities, unit mapping-cone model, unit mapping-cone closed-embedding, unit mapping-cone open-map, unit mapping-cone cokernel-top, unit mapping-cone kernel-equality, and unit mapping-cone isomorphism inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any future product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
